_doc: Mali-G610 GPU spec (Phase 1.2). Micro-benchmark (mali_matmul.json) is the primary source; analytic roofline is a SWAPPABLE slot for model-swap, giving a shape-trend fit (mostly <= measured but NOT a strict lower bound: ~1/3 over-predict by up to +5%; NOT transferable calibration; 5 points insufficient). HONESTY: the Phase 1.1 20.12 GFLOP/s point is FP16, NOT INT8; INT8 GPU GEMM has ZERO data (kernel is FP32/FP16 only). FP32 peak 512 GFLOP/s is an assumption that may UNDERESTIMATE by 2-4x.

notes.int8: ZERO INT8 GPU GEMM data; Mali matmul kernel is FP32/FP16 only.
notes.peak: FP32 512 GFLOP/s = assumption; may underestimate 2-4x; needs verification.
notes.roofline: shape-trend fit (mostly <= measured but NOT a strict lower bound; ~1/3 over-predict); not transferable calibration.
notes.ksweep_saturation_M: DEAD param (kept, not deleted; annotated per audit).

roofline_fit._doc: CALIBRATED roofline slot (FP16, shape-trend fit, not transferable). eff_compute_fp16 = converged f16 GFLOP/s / fp16 peak; mem_eff_BW_GBs = lstsq fit to FP16 decode-GEMV. INT8 = zero data. NOT a strict lower bound (~1/3 of points over-predict by up to +5%; see frac_pred_le_measured).
roofline_fit.honesty: shape-trend fit, FP16 only; mostly <= measured but ~1/3 over-predict (NOT a strict lower bound)
